message:
Analyze this email and determine if it contains loan-related information.

Email Subject: View Anisha Babbar’s post and your next steps
Email Content: Now, take these next steps for more success We’ll send you LinkedIn updates, updates from your network, recruiter messages and promotional messages. You can change your preferences anytime. Explore related trending posts Based on your recent activity Anisha Babbar shared a post: HI Connections! TO THE NEW is Hiring: Content Marketer (Contractual role for client location) We are looking for #ContentMarketers -Good knowledge… LIKE PRAISE EMPATHY 42, 3 Comments Read more: https://www.linkedin.com/comm/feed/update/share:7406982967295877120?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_next_best_action_digest_01%3BXX%2F%2BzSvOSd2jckF0USYUag%3D%3D&midToken=AQFMjYnuODQXdg&midSig=2-kOyFDAqlFY41&trk=eml-email_next_best_action_digest_01-network~post~cta~text-0-read~more&trkEmail=eml-email_next_best_action_digest_01-network~post~cta~text-0-read~more-null-10ivnq~mk9ddbdl~ln-null-null&eid=10ivnq-mk9ddbdl-ln&otpToken=MTQwNDFkZTQxNTJlYzhjMGJlMmYwMmVjNGUxZmU2Yjc4NmNlZDg0OTlmYWM4NTZkNzljNjAxNjY0ZTVmNWJmNWZjZDBiM2

Determine if this is:
1. A quarterly loan summary (contains outstanding balance, principal paid, interest paid, EMI details)
2. An interest rate change notification (contains old rate, new rate, effective date)
3. Other loan-related email
4. Not a loan email

Return ONLY a JSON object with:
{
  "isLoanEmail": true or false,
  "emailType": "quarterly-summary" | "interest-rate-change" | "other",
  "confidence": number between 0 and 1
}
systemPrompt: You are a financial email analyzer. Analyze emails and determine if they contain loan information. Return ONLY valid JSON with "isLoanEmail" (boolean), "emailType" (string), and "confidence" (number 0-1) fields.
